name: Rapamycin Chow Formulation and Quality Control
preprompt: Define how encapsulated rapamycin chow at 14 ppm and eudragit-only control chow are prepared, labeled, stored, and verified. Include batch documentation, stability/QC checks, blinding of diet identity, and procedures for replacing or discarding compromised chow.
tooling: Read: own data, TOCs and summaries of all other components. Write: own data only.
summary: Ensures the intervention and control diets are compositionally matched except for rapamycin and remain stable throughout the study.
